transcript: Speaker A (AI): काल कुठे गेला होतास? [Where did you go yesterday?] Speaker B (Human): I went to माल yesterday. Speaker A (AI): माल? प्रणाउन्सिएशन थोडे चुकले. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. काल काय खाल्लेस? [Mall? Pronunciation is a bit wrong. It is Mall. I went to the mall yesterday. What did you eat yesterday?] Speaker B (Human): I eat पीजा खाल्ला. [I eat pizza.] Speaker A (AI): पीजा? नाही, Pizza. आणि गोष्ट कालची आहे म्हणून Eat नाही, Ate. I ate pizza. ट्रेन कुठून पकडतोस? [Pizza? No, Pizza. And since it's about yesterday, not Eat, Ate. I ate pizza. Where do you catch the train from?] Speaker B (Human): I pick train from railway ईस्टेशन. [I pick train from railway station.] Speaker A (AI): Pick? Pick म्हणजे उचलणं. ट्रेन उचलणार का? Catch म्हणजे पकडणं. आणि ईस्टेशन नाही, Station. I catch the train from the railway station. [Pick? Pick means to lift. Are you going to lift the train? Catch means to catch. And not estation, Station. I catch the train from the railway station.] Speaker B (Human): Ohhh माझं प्रणाउन्सिएशन वीक आहे. [Ohhh my pronunciation is weak.] Speaker A (AI): काही हरकत नाही. AI टीचर ट्राय केला का? [No problem. Did you try AI Teacher?] Speaker B (Human): तो महाग असेल ना? [It must be expensive, right?] Speaker A (AI): अजिबात नाही. नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा सातपट स्वस्त आहे. म्हणून ५० लाख लोक MySivi वर प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत. [Not at all. It is 7 times cheaper than normal English classes. That's why 50 lakh people are practicing on MySivi.] Speaker B (Human): पण टाईम मिळत नाही रोज. [But I don't get time daily.] Speaker A (AI): रोज फक्त १५ ते २० मिनिटं प्रॅक्टिस पुरेशी आहे. हळूहळू कॉन्फिडेंट होशील. [Just 15 to 20 minutes of practice daily is enough. You will slowly become confident.] Speaker B (Human): वाव, कसं जॉईन करू? [Wow, how do I join?] Speaker A (AI): खाली इन्स्टॉल बटनावर क्लिक कर. MySivi App इन्स्टॉल कर, साईन अप कर आणि प्रॅक्टिस सुरू कर. फक्त १५ दिवसात इम्प्रूव्हमेंट दिसायला लागेल. ट्रायल फक्त १ रुपयांमध्ये ३ दिवसांसाठी आहे. आत्ताच सुरू कर. [Click on the install button below. Install MySivi App, sign up and start practicing. You will start seeing improvement in just 15 days. Trial is for just 1 rupee for 3 days. Start now.] Speaker C (Voiceover): Install Now वरती क्लिक करा आणि MySivi App डाऊनलोड करा. [Click on Install Now and download MySivi App.]
on_screen_text: "काल कुठे गेला" [Where did you go yesterday] "I went to माल yesterday" "प्रणाउन्सिएशन थोडे चुकले" [Pronunciation is a bit wrong] "It is Mall" "I went to the mall yesterday" "काल काय खाल्लेस" [What did you eat yesterday] "I eat पीजा खाल्ला" "पीजा नाही" [Not pizza] "Pizza आणि गोष्ट कालची आहे" [Pizza and it's about yesterday] "म्हणून Eat नाही" [So not Eat] "Ate" "I ate pizza" "ट्रेन कुठून पकडतोस" [Where do you catch the train from] "I pick train from railway ईस्टेशन" "Pick म्हणजे उचलणं" [Pick means to lift] "ट्रेन उचलणार का" [Will you lift the train] "Catch म्हणजे पकडणं" [Catch means to catch] "आणि ईस्टेशन नाही" [And not estation] "Station" "I catch the train from the railway station" "ohhh माझं प्रणाउन्सिएशन वीक आहे" [ohhh my pronunciation is weak] "काही हरकत नाही" [No problem] "AI टीचर ट्राय केला का" [Did you try AI teacher] "तो महाग असेल ना" [It must be expensive, right] "अजिबात नाही" [Not at all] "नॉर्मल इंग्लिश क्लासेस पेक्षा" [Than normal English classes] "सातपट स्वस्त" [7 times cheaper] "म्हणून ५० लाख लोक MySivi वर" [That's why 50 lakh people on MySivi] "प्रॅक्टिस करत आहेत" [Are practicing] "पण टाईम मिळत नाही रोज" [But don't get time daily] "फक्त १५ ते २० मिनिटं" [Just 15 to 20 minutes] "प्रॅक्टिस पुरेशी" [Practice is enough] "हळूहळू कॉन्फिडेंट" [Slowly confident] "होशील" [Will become] "वाव" [Wow] "कसं जॉईन करू" [How to join] "खाली इन्स्टॉल" [Below install] "बटनावर क्लिक कर" [Click on button] "MySivi App इन्स्टॉल" [Install MySivi App] "साईन अप कर आणि" [Sign up and] "प्रॅक्टिस सुरू" [Start practice] "करा" [Do] "फक्त पंधरा" [Just fifteen] "दिवसात इम्प्रूव्हमेंट" [Days improvement] "दिसायला लागेल" [Will start showing] "ट्रायल फक्त १" [Trial just 1] "MySivi" "Sale Ends Today" "सगळं UNLOCK करा" [Unlock everything] "OFFER ₹30 ₹1" "MySivi Pro फायदे" [MySivi Pro benefits] "२४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher" [24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher] "तुमचं grammar correct होईल instant feedback सोबत." [Your grammar will be corrected with instant feedback.] "Offer ends in 09:58" "PAY USING PhonePe" "Start Trial at ₹1" "सगळे Payments safe आहेत. कधीही Cancel करू शकता." [All payments are safe. Can cancel anytime.] "MySivi English speaking app Install Now"
summary: An AI robot avatar corrects a Marathi-speaking man's English grammar and pronunciation in a split-screen format. The AI then pitches the MySivi app as an affordable, quick daily practice tool to build confidence. The ad ends with a promotional offer of a 3-day trial for 1 rupee and a call to install the app.
